case_title: ROSE MINTA THERESA VS. LAURENCE GRIFFIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-08-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROSE MINTA THERESA & DEFENDANT LAURENCE GRIFFIN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AND DEFENDANT WAS UNWILLING TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANT WAS UNWILLING TO HAVE THE MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY THERESA, ROSE MINTA AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, LAURENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THERESA, ROSE MINTA AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, LAURENCE
NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
